orderId.description: The unique identifier of the confirmed order.

customer.description: Details about the customer who confirmed the order.

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

items.description: A list of items included in the confirmed order, each containing product details and quantities.

productId.description: The unique identifier of the product.

sku.description: The stock keeping unit of the product.

quantity.description: The quantity of the product ordered.

unitPrice.description: The price per unit of the product.

lineTotal.description: The total price for this order item (quantity * unitPrice).

orderStatus.description: The current status of the order after confirmation.

total.description: The total cost of the order.

amount.description: The total amount of the order.

currency.description: The currency of the total amount.

shipping.description: Details about the shipping of the order.

method.description: The shipping method used for the order.

address.description: The shipping address for the order.

confirmedAt.description: The date and time when the order was confirmed.
